differences.title: 1. DATA MODEL
differences.leftDesc: Optimized for wide rows and sparse data. Flexible schema.
differences.rightDesc: Simple key-value or document store. Predictable schema.

differences.title: 2. SCALABILITY
differences.leftDesc: Add nodes to scale; manual cluster management.

differences.title: 3. AVAILABILITY
differences.leftDesc: Masterless architecture ensures no single point of failure.
differences.rightDesc: Managed by AWS for high availability and fault tolerance.

differences.title: 4. CONSISTENCY
differences.leftDesc: Choose between strong and eventual consistency per query.
differences.rightDesc: Offers strong consistency or eventual consistency.

differences.title: 5. OPERATIONAL OVERHEAD
differences.leftDesc: Requires significant operational effort for setup and maintenance.
differences.rightDesc: No server management; focus on application logic.

differences.title: 6. QUERYING
differences.rightDesc: Primary access via SDKs and REST APIs.

differences.title: 7. COST MODEL
differences.leftDesc: Costs based on server hardware and operational staff.
differences.rightDesc: Pay for provisioned throughput and storage used.
